text:
One evening, Fred went for a walk. Fred loves walking. Fred loves walking best. He even carries a small basket full of goodies to enjoy along the way. Fred felt good. And maybe that gum he found?

All he had to do was take one big leap. Right? It felt good jumping! And that gum smelled delicious. Fred didn't think twice...

He popped it into his mouth. Best flavor ever? Perhaps that was just his taste buds? Regardless, Fred felt fantastic.

That night, Fred dreamed vividly. Fred sailed a boat through the stars. He didn't know anything else. That night felt perfect.

And maybe that dream was all his imagination? Or perhaps it wasn't. That's ok. Fred slept sweet dreams.

When dawn arrived, nothing had changed. Just another stroll. Except maybe now Fred felt slightly more optimistic. maybe it wasn't silly?

Tomorrow Fred would know...<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
